name: Mini-Strawberry Cheesecakes
recipeIngredient: 10 ounces frozen strawberries, thawed and undrained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Mix flour and powdered sugar.
2. Cut in butter until the mixture resembles fine crumbs.
3. Press firmly and evenly into the bottom of an ungreased rectangular pan, 13 x 9 x 2 inches.
4. Bake for 15 minutes.
5. Beat cream cheese in a medium bowl until smooth and fluffy.
6. Beat in granulated sugar and eggs.
7. Stir in thawed strawberries (undrained).
8. Spread the cream cheese mixture over the baked layer.
9. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes, or until the center is set.
10. Cool completely. Cover loosely and refrigerate about 4 hours, or until firm.
11. Cut into about 2 x 1 1/2 inch bars. Garnish with sliced strawberries, if desired.
